Solution:
Customers are advised to upgrade to the latest supported python releases to remediate this vulnerability.
For latest release visit here.
Threat:
Python is an interpreted high-level programming language for general-purpose programming.

Python 3.7.x reached End of Life in its support cycle on June 27, 2023.

Since there are no further bug fixes or security updates for the python 3.7.x series, it's highly recommended to migrate to newer supported versions.

Affected Versions:
Python 3.7.x

QID Detection Logic (Authenticated)
This checks for vulnerable version of Python.
Impact: The system is at high risk of being exposed to security vulnerabilities. Since the vendor no longer provides updates, obsolete software is more vulnerable to viruses and other attacks.
